parameters.command: CID=$(security find-generic-password -s calvinball-mcp -a client-id -w) && CSEC=$(security find-generic-password -s calvinball-mcp -a client-secret -w) && curl -sf -X POST https://calvinball.mikebronner.dev/oauth/token -d grant_type=client_credentials -d client_id=$CID -d client_secret=$CSEC | jq -r .access_token

=LOG=$HOME/.n8n/logs/tracer-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ).log && mkdir -p $HOME/.n8n/logs && WORKBENCH_SKIP_WARMUP=1 WORKBENCH_SKIP_LOG=1 claude -p --agent dev-pipeline:tracer-bullet --model sonnet --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence "Review these Calvinball items: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}" 2>&1 | tee "$LOG"
